February 11, 2026

A kettle is one of the few appliances used every single day, which makes durability the only specification that matters over a decade of ownership. Most spec sheets never mention it.

The hinge on the lid is the first thing to fail on cheap models. Look for a metal pin rather than a moulded plastic one, and check that replacement hinges are sold separately.

Descaling twice a year keeps the heating element efficient. Plain citric acid works as well as any branded product and costs a fraction of the price.

kitchen reviews buying
